data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of photo/video evidence attachments as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of this requirement. The linked use case explicitly states the need for photo/video evidence attachments, but the absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in implementation.
gaps: Photo/video evidence attachments are not evidenced in the prior steps.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
